title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the harness (wrapper, rules, skills, hooks, subagents) from the model itself, with two levels: single-session AI layer configuration and multi-session orchestration for scaling coding agents. The harness comprises roughly 98% of systems like Claude Code.
